languages.original_text: "Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"

languages.text: "Мертвая материя, частично превращенная в фантомы, застывшая вне круговорота времени. Сколь странная тяга к накопительству... Для чего этот огир окружает себя всеми этими предметами?"
languages.translation_comment: characters came to Trazyn's museum for the first time

languages.text: "Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"
languages.original_text: "Мертвая материя, частично превращенная в фантомы, застывшая вне круговорота времени. Сколь странная тяга к накопительству... Для чего этот огир окружает себя всеми этими предметами?"

traits.locale_text: "Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"
"Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"
"Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"

languages.text: 「死んだ物質が幻影に変化し、時間のサイクルの外に凍り付いている。限りを超えて集めたいという奇妙な衝動... このオグイヤーがなぜこのような物で自分を囲んでいるのか？」
languages.original_text: "Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"

traits.locale_text: 「死んだ物質が幻影に変化し、時間のサイクルの外に凍り付いている。限りを超えて集めたいという奇妙な衝動... このオグイヤーがなぜこのような物で自分を囲んでいるのか？」

languages.text: « De la matière morte, partiellement transformée en fantômes figés en dehors du cycle du temps. Ce besoin d'amasser à l'excès est bien étrange... Pourquoi cet Oghyr s'entoure-t-il de tous ces objets ? »
languages.original_text: "Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"

traits.locale_text: « De la matière morte, partiellement transformée en fantômes figés en dehors du cycle du temps. Ce besoin d'amasser à l'excès est bien étrange... Pourquoi cet Oghyr s'entoure-t-il de tous ces objets ? »

languages.text: "Tote Materie, partiell zu Phantomen transformiert, gefroren außerhalb des Zyklus der Zeit. Was für ein seltsamer Drang, ungezügelt zu sammeln ... Warum umgibt sich dieser Oghyr mit all diesen Gegenständen?"
languages.original_text: "Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"

traits.locale_text: "Tote Materie, partiell zu Phantomen transformiert, gefroren außerhalb des Zyklus der Zeit. Was für ein seltsamer Drang, ungezügelt zu sammeln ... Warum umgibt sich dieser Oghyr mit all diesen Gegenständen?"

languages.text: "Ölü madde; kısmen hayaletlere dönüşmüş, zaman döngüsünün dışında donmuş. Sınırsızca toplamak için ne tuhaf bir dürtü... Bu Oghyr neden kendini tüm bu nesnelerle çevreliyor?"
languages.original_text: "Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"

traits.locale_text: "Ölü madde; kısmen hayaletlere dönüşmüş, zaman döngüsünün dışında donmuş. Sınırsızca toplamak için ne tuhaf bir dürtü... Bu Oghyr neden kendini tüm bu nesnelerle çevreliyor?"

languages.text: «Materia muerta, parcialmente transformada en fantasmas atrapados fuera del ciclo del tiempo. Qué extraño impulso de coleccionar sin descanso... ¿Por qué se rodea este oghyr de todos estos objetos?».
languages.original_text: "Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"

traits.locale_text: «Materia muerta, parcialmente transformada en fantasmas atrapados fuera del ciclo del tiempo. Qué extraño impulso de coleccionar sin descanso... ¿Por qué se rodea este oghyr de todos estos objetos?».

languages.text: “死寂之物，部分已化为幻影，被永远冻结在时光之外。如此怪异且无止境的收藏欲……为何遗落者要用这些物件将自己重重包围？”
languages.original_text: "Dead matter, partially transformed into phantoms, frozen outside the cycle of time. What a strange urge to collect without limit... Why does this Oghyr surround himself with all these objects?"

traits.locale_text: “死寂之物，部分已化为幻影，被永远冻结在时光之外。如此怪异且无止境的收藏欲……为何遗落者要用这些物件将自己重重包围？”
